title: DistillPDF Demo Document
list_items: Headings are recovered from font size and weight.
Tables are reconstructed into rows and cells.
Figures are wrapped together with their captions.
paragraph_snippets: self-contained demo used by the distillpdf
reconstructs the logical structure of a PDF
fixed layout so its extracted structure is

ordered: The overview section introduces the platypus layout pipeline and sets the stage.
Background material explains how each flowable is positioned by a translate transform.
Our approach reconstructs the reading order directly from the graphics transform.
Results confirm the blocks are extracted from top to bottom with no content loss.
In conclusion the cm positioned document reads in exactly the correct order.
